title: Shared Backpack
description: Adds the command /backpack which opens an inventory where anyone can take items out and put them in
body:
#### The SharedBackpack plugin adds a shared backpack inventory to your Minecraft server, accessible by all players. With a simple command, players can open a 4-row inventory to store and retrieve items. The backpack’s contents are saved in the configuration file, ensuring they persist across server restarts.

### Features 
- #### Shared 4-row inventory (36 slots) for all players
- #### Simple command to open the backpack
- #### Backpack contents are saved in config.yml to persist between server restarts
- #### Compatible with Minecraft version 1.16+



### Commands 


- #### /backpack - Opens the backpack inventory.
- #### /bp aliases for /backpack
